## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `cd src-tauri && cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean (if Rust changed)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/scope changed (`docs/`)
- [ ] No new sample/demo data; no app-level login added (scope: GitHub push-only)
